tracks.rawText: 2:310 Lead VocalsUploadLatin pop rock with a driving 4/4 beat at 128 BPM in the key of G major, The arrangement features a prominent distorted electric guitar playing power chords and melodic lead lines, supported by a thick synth bass and a standard rock drum kit with a heavy snare on the backbeat, Male vocals are delivered with a powerful, belting chest voice in the chorus and a more melodic, mid-range delivery in the verses, Shimmering synth pads and occasional electronic sweeps provide atmospheric texture in the background, The production is polished with modern compression and a moderate hall reverb on the vocals71PublishRemix
tracks.title: 0 Lead Vocals

tracks.rawText: 2:390 Lead VocalsUploadLatin Pop ballad with a high-energy, anthemic arrangement, The track features a prominent acoustic guitar strumming rhythmic patterns, supported by a driving pop drum kit with a crisp snare and active hi-hats, A melodic electric bass follows the chord progression with a rounded tone, The lead male vocals are powerful and emotive, utilizing a wide dynamic range from chest voice to soaring belts, Shimmering synth pads and subtle orchestral strings provide harmonic density in the background, The arrangement builds into a climactic finale with sustained vocal notes and crashing cymbals, The tempo is approximately 120 BPM in the key of G Major1PublishRemix
tracks.title: 0 Lead Vocals

tracks.rawText: 3:080 Lead VocalsUploadLatin pop ballad with a high-energy rock-influenced chorus, The arrangement features a prominent acoustic guitar playing rhythmic strumming patterns in the verses, transitioning to overdriven electric guitars with power chords in the chorus, A synth bass provides a steady low-end presence, while the drum kit uses a standard pop-rock pattern with a crisp snare and driving kick, The lead male vocal is passionate and melodic, utilizing a wide dynamic range from intimate chest voice to powerful belted notes and sustained head voice ornaments, The track is in the key of G Major with a tempo of 128 BPM in 4/4 time, Production includes polished vocal compression and hall reverb on the guitars and vocals2PublishRemix
